overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character walking through a dark, stormy desert landscape. The scene features a sepia-toned, low-light environment with scattered rock formations and a persistent dust storm visible in the distant background throughout the continuous forward movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through flat desert terrain toward a distant dust storm on the horizon

entered.detail: large dark dust cloud rising on the horizon, visible throughout the scene
scattered rock formations visible in the left distance
scattered rock formations visible in the right distance
flat sandy ground extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive desert landscape under a dark, stormy sky. A massive dust plume looms in the distant center while scattered rock clusters dot the far left and right horizons. The terrain is flat and sandy with no vegetation or other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert field with scattered boulders

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with increased density of stone formations on the ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly rocky terrain with boulders scattered across the path

entered.detail: dense scattering of medium-sized rocks covering the ground ahead
prominent cluster of large boulders rising from the sand

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a rockier section of the desert where the ground is littered with stones and boulders. Large rock formations appear on the right side while the distant dust storm remains visible ahead. The distant rock clusters from the previous section fall behind as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert passage with large boulder formations

events.description: character passes closely by large boulder formation on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past large boulder clusters and continuing toward the distant dust storm

entered.detail: very large boulder formation passing by on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes very close to massive boulder formations on the right side before the terrain opens up again. The dust storm continues to dominate the distant center horizon while the immediate surroundings return to more open desert with only scattered distant rocks visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate, stormy desert that shifts from an open sandy plain into a rugged rocky corridor before returning to an expansive wasteland. It begins with the character traversing a flat, sandy expanse under a dark sky, with a massive dust plume looming in the distant center. As the character progresses, the terrain transitions into a rockier section where the ground becomes littered with stones and large boulder formations emerge on the right. The camera then passes closely alongside these massive rocks before the landscape opens up once more, leaving the boulders behind. Finally, the scene returns to an open desert environment with only scattered distant rocks visible beneath the dominating presence of the far-off dust storm.
